arts.ttl: Palladino: “Fiorentina want to qualify among the top 8”
arts.sum: Fiorentina’s coach Raffaele Palladino expressed his determination and optimism ahead of the UEFA Conference League match against Pafos. In an interview with Sky Sport, Palladino stated, “I will try to put the best possible formation on the field; there is a lot of positive energy. We must play a spirited game. We must and want to qualify among the top eight: it matters to us and would allow us to play two fewer matches in February.” This statement underscores the team’s ambition to secure a top-eight finish in the league phase, which would grant them direct entry into the knockout The post Palladino: “Fiorentina want to qualify among the top 8” appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Palladino: ‘Fiorentina must concentrate on Pafos, not Inter’
arts.sum: Raffaele Palladino warns Fiorentina must be ‘completely concentrated’ on Pafos and the Conference League, despite...

arts.ttl: Conference League | Fiorentina v Pafos : Match Prediction, Preview, Team News and Lineups
arts.sum: Fiorentina and Pafos FC are set to clash in a crucial UEFA Conference League match at Stadio Artemio Franchi on Thursday afternoon. Both teams currently find themselves tied in the standings, each with six points from three matches, and are eager to secure a victory that would enhance their chances of finishing in the top eight and advancing to the knockout stages. Fiorentina enter this match following a mixed run in the Conference League, having recently suffered their first defeat of the season against APOEL, losing 2-1 in Nicosia.
